'''showayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meanish|meanish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meanish|meanish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| showayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:showayithi|showayithi]] || [[word:showayiji|showayiji]] || [[word:showayishi|showayishi]] || [[word:showayiki|showayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:showayuthuthu|showayuthuthu]] || [[word:showayujuju|showayujuju]] || [[word:showayushushu|showayushushu]] || [[word:showayukuku|showayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:showayuthu|showayuthu]] || [[word:showayuju|showayuju]] || [[word:showayushu|showayushu]] || [[word:showayuku|showayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:showayufthuf|showayufthuf]] || [[word:showayufjuf|showayufjuf]] || [[word:showayufshuf|showayufshuf]] || [[word:showayufkuf|showayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:showayethe|showayethe]] || [[word:showayeje|showayeje]] || [[word:showayeshe|showayeshe]] || [[word:showayeke|showayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:showayothotho|showayothotho]] || [[word:showayojojo|showayojojo]] || [[word:showayoshosho|showayoshosho]] || [[word:showayokoko|showayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:showayotho|showayotho]] || [[word:showayojo|showayojo]] || [[word:showayosho|showayosho]] || [[word:showayoko|showayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:showayofthof|showayofthof]] || [[word:showayofjof|showayofjof]] || [[word:showayofshof|showayofshof]] || [[word:showayofkof|showayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:showayïfthïf|showayïfthïf]] || [[word:showayïfjïf|showayïfjïf]] || [[word:showayïfshïf|showayïfshïf]] || [[word:showayïfkïf|showayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:showayïfthïfthïf|showayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:showayïfjïfjïf|showayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:showayïfshïfshïf|showayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:showayïfkïfkïf|showayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:showayïfthïf|showayïfthïf]] || [[word:showayïfjïf|showayïfjïf]] || [[word:showayïfshïf|showayïfshïf]] || [[word:showayïfkïf|showayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:showayïfthïf|showayïfthïf]] || [[word:showayïfjïf|showayïfjïf]] || [[word:showayïfshïf|showayïfshïf]] || [[word:showayïfkïf|showayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:showayæthæ|showayæthæ]] || [[word:showayæjæ|showayæjæ]] || [[word:showayæshæ|showayæshæ]] || [[word:showayækæ|showayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:showayathatha|showayathatha]] || [[word:showayajaja|showayajaja]] || [[word:showayashasha|showayashasha]] || [[word:showayakaka|showayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:showayatha|showayatha]] || [[word:showayaja|showayaja]] || [[word:showayasha|showayasha]] || [[word:showayaka|showayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:showayafthaf|showayafthaf]] || [[word:showayafjaf|showayafjaf]] || [[word:showayafshaf|showayafshaf]] || [[word:showayafkaf|showayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:showayasha|showayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:showayshësha|showayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:showayrosha|showayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:showaymusha|showaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:showayasha|showayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshowaynkshësha|goshowaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshowaynkrosha|goshowaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshowaynkmusha|goshowaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshowaynkyasha|goshowaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:showawayasha|showawayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:showawayshësha|showawayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:showawayrosha|showawayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:showawaymusha|showawaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:showawayasha|showawayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshowawaynkshësha|goshowawaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshowawaynkrosha|goshowawaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshowawaynkmusha|goshowawaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshowawaynkyasha|goshowawaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shewæyasha|shewæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shewæyshësha|shewæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shewæyrosha|shewæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shewæymusha|shewæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shewæyasha|shewæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshewæynkshësha|goshewæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshewæynkrosha|goshewæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshewæynkmusha|goshewæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshewæynkyasha|goshewæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:showfayasha|showfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:showfayshësha|showfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:showfayrosha|showfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:showfaymusha|showfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:showfayasha|showfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshowfaynkshësha|goshowfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshowfaynkrosha|goshowfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshowfaynkmusha|goshowfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshowfaynkyasha|goshowfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
